summary: **Status:** design proposal, 2026-07-08. Answers the maintainer's standing worry about the "OWL/constraint layer": is the kernel missing a logical-constraint formalism, and if so what should it be? **Author:** formalism-audit agent (Claude Fable 5), for @[account-redacted]. **Litmus example (maintainer's):** *"a human has exactly two parents, one male and one female."* **Inputs read:** encoder/src/{lexicon,ast,validate}.ts; data/kernel-v0/ (records + README + minted-urns); data/molecules-v0/; data/lexical-wn
title: Design record — the constraint/axiom layer (formalism audit + design)
